CustomField.description: The derate percentage is subject to change depending on the current thrust setting of the engine. The rate varies accordingly based on this derate percentage. This applies specifically to the FH to FC ratio rate basis. The MR calculation is determined by the ratio, derate percentage, and interpolation. The default value for this field is set to 0, but the user can update it for the FH to FC ratio rate basis.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The derate percentage is subject to change depending on the current thrust setting of the engine. The rate varies accordingly based on this derate percentage. This applies specifically to the FH to FC ratio rate basis. The MR calculation is determined by the ratio, derate percentage, and interpolation.
CustomField.label: Derate Percentage
